metadata.description: Machine-readable compliance rules extracted from the Puro.earth Biochar Methodology and calibrated against historical verifier audit findings.

rules.name: H/Corg Ratio Maximum
rules.description: Biochar must have molar H/Corg ratio below 0.7 per EBC/IBI standards. Values at or above 0.7 indicate incomplete carbonization.
rules.audit_finding_source: Charm Industrial: Total Carbon used instead of Organic Carbon; FDurable calculated as 1.05 exceeding allowable max

rules.name: Organic Carbon Content Present
rules.description: Each biochar sample must report organic carbon (Corg) content, not total carbon. Using total carbon overstates permanence.
rules.audit_finding_source: Charm Industrial: Total Carbon used instead of Organic Carbon (Corg)

rules.name: Pyrolysis Temperature Within Range
rules.description: Pyrolysis temperature must be between 350°C and 900°C. Batches outside this range may not qualify as biochar.
rules.audit_finding_source: Black Bull Biochar: Pyrolysis temperature variance 299-695°C, batches outside range still counted

rules.name: Dry Biochar Mass Recorded
rules.description: Each production batch must have a recorded dry biochar mass. Missing mass measurements undermine carbon quantification.
rules.audit_finding_source: Black Bull Biochar: Missing measurements for 6-20% of bags

rules.name: Moisture Content Recorded
rules.description: Each batch must have moisture content recorded to validate dry mass calculation. High variability (7-62%) makes this critical.
rules.audit_finding_source: Black Bull Biochar: Dry biochar mass highly variable (moisture 7.5-61.6%)

rules.name: Wet Weight Recorded
rules.description: Wet weight must be recorded for each batch to enable correct transport emission calculations.
rules.audit_finding_source: American BioCarbon 2023: Transport GHG miscalculated — divided by dry weight instead of wet weight for truck capacity

rules.name: Scale Calibration Current
rules.description: Weighing scale calibration certificate must be valid (not expired) during the reporting period.
rules.audit_finding_source: Black Bull Biochar: Scale calibration certificate expired

rules.name: E_biomass Present
rules.description: LCA must include biomass supply chain emissions (E_biomass) covering feedstock sourcing, harvesting, and transport to production site.
rules.audit_finding_source: Aperam Bioenergia: Emission allocation errors between E_biomass, E_production, E_use

rules.name: E_production Present
rules.description: LCA must include production emissions (E_production) covering energy use, equipment, and process emissions during pyrolysis.
rules.audit_finding_source: Aperam Bioenergia: Flue gas emissions missing from E_production

rules.name: E_use Present
rules.description: LCA must include end-use emissions (E_use) covering transport to application site and application method.
rules.audit_finding_source: American BioCarbon 2025: E_use values didn't match weekly LCAs (copy errors)

rules.name: Diesel Equipment Emissions Included
rules.description: All diesel-powered equipment (forklifts, telehandlers, loaders) must be included in emission calculations.
rules.audit_finding_source: Black Bull Biochar: Diesel usage from forklifts/telehandlers not included

rules.name: Wastewater Emissions Included
rules.description: Wastewater treatment emissions must be accounted for if the production process generates wastewater.
rules.audit_finding_source: Black Bull Biochar: Wastewater treatment emissions not included

rules.name: Soil Temperature Matches Region
rules.description: Soil temperature used for permanence decay calculations must reflect the actual application region, not a blanket default.
rules.audit_finding_source: American BioCarbon 2023: Soil temperature standardized at 15°C for Maine, Florida, Guatemala, Mexico

rules.name: Transport Distance in Kilometres
rules.description: All transport distances must be reported in kilometres (km), not miles. Incorrect units cause systematic undercount of transport emissions.
rules.audit_finding_source: Charm Industrial: Delivery distance in miles not km

rules.name: Unit Consistency (tCO2e)
rules.description: All emission values in the LCA must be in the same unit (tCO2e total volume). Mixing per-tonne and total-volume figures causes material misstatement.
rules.audit_finding_source: American BioCarbon 2025: All GHG emissions except E_stored reported per tonne instead of per total volume

rules.name: CORC Formula Validation
rules.description: Net carbon removal (CORCs) must equal E_stored minus E_biomass minus E_production minus E_use. Any deviation indicates a calculation error.
rules.audit_finding_source: American BioCarbon 2025: Unit conversion kgCO2e / 1000 instead of / 1

rules.name: Lab Reports Cover Reporting Period
rules.description: Laboratory analysis reports must be dated within the reporting period. Using prior-period lab data undermines representativeness.
rules.audit_finding_source: Aperam Bioenergia: LCA used prior year (CY2023) data for 2024-2025 reporting period

rules.name: Sufficient Lab Reports for Variability
rules.description: At least one lab report per quarter is required when biochar properties show high variability across batches.
rules.audit_finding_source: Black Bull Biochar: Single lab report for entire period despite high variability

rules.name: Opening Stock Matches Prior Closing
rules.description: Opening stock for the reporting period must exactly match the closing stock from the prior period. Unexplained discrepancies indicate inventory errors.
rules.audit_finding_source: Aperam Bioenergia: Opening stock claimed but never previously reported

rules.name: Feedstock Sustainability Documentation
rules.description: Documentation must be provided demonstrating feedstock sustainability (waste/residue origin, no deforestation linkage).
rules.audit_finding_source: General verifier requirement across multiple audits
